title: Documentation
description: Reference guide for namespaces, file layout, React hooks, CLI commands, and best practices.

namespaces.colon_desc: The colon : separates the file name (namespace) from the key path.
namespaces.hierarchical_desc: Multiple colons create subdirectory paths inside your locale folder.

organize.title: Organize by feature/page
organize.desc: One JSON/TOML file per page or feature. Avoids bloated single-file translation sets.

semantic.title: Use semantic keys
semantic.desc: Keys should describe the content, not the UI position. Easier for translators.

default_ns.title: Set defaultNamespace
default_ns.desc: Avoid repeating the namespace prefix for common translations.

lazy_load.title: Use HttpBackend + --split
lazy_load.desc: Lazy-load only the namespaces needed per page. Massive performance win for large apps.

encrypt.title: Encrypt sensitive bundles
encrypt.desc: Use AES-256-GCM encryption for bundles with sensitive copy (legal, internal tools).

whitelist.title: Key whitelist validation
whitelist.desc: The DefaultKeyParser allows only a-zA-Z0-9_-.:: — safe by default.
